name: Chocolate Fudge Cake with Caramel Sauce
recipeIngredient: Topping: 150g dark chocolate, chopped; 120g copha, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugar until creamy.
2. Gradually beat in egg yolks and then 2.5 cups water. Mix until well combined.
3. Gently fold in the flour and cocoa powder. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form and fold through the chocolate mixture.
4. Fold in the walnuts. Pour into a greased and floured 23cm round cake tin.
5. Bake at 180°C for 20 minutes.
6. Cool slightly.
7. Meanwhile, combine butter, golden syrup, and sweetened condensed milk in a saucepan. Stir over medium heat until smooth. Bring to the boil and pour over warm cake.
8. Return to oven and cook at 180°C for an additional 20 minutes.
9. Cool in tin.
10. For topping, melt chocolate and copha in a saucepan over low heat until well combined. Spread over the cooled cake.
11. Cool and serve with warm caramel sauce.
12. Serves 10-12.
Caramel Sauce:
1. Combine 125g butter and 250g brown sugar in a saucepan. Stir over low heat until well combined.
2. Add 500ml cream and stir vigorously. Bring to the boil and simmer for 3-4 minutes.
